_about: MYBC Week 1 regenerate manifest. Each post stores the exact Magnific generation so any can be re-rolled locally via Claude CLI + Magnific MCP. See README.md.

posts.prompt: Ultra realistic cinematic MYBC Welcome Bonus promo visual, dark purple and navy luxury casino mood with warm gold light. Foreground: three premium black-and-gold gift chests in a row on a glossy dark casino table, clearly labeled "1ST", "2ND", "3RD", each open and glowing from inside, overflowing with cash bundles, gold USDT coins and golden free-round spin tokens. Above and between them floats a polished gold "WELCOME BONUS" emblem badge with warm light. Floating gold coins and black-gold casino chips, soft smoke, subtle green table reflections. Background: blurred MYBC casino dashboard on a laptop (use the MYBC dashboard UI reference), purple UI glow, orange CTA bokeh, unreadable UI. Place the white handwritten MYBC logo reference exactly as provided in the bottom-right corner. Small premium gold plaque reading: "100% CASH + 100% FREE ROUNDS" and "UP TO 1500 USDT + 1500 FR". Shallow depth of field, 85mm lens, ultra realistic high-end commercial product photography, 16:9. No people, no hands, no cartoon, no cheap plastic render.
